default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, Agent Engine launch, and AI tracking strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Agent Engine Soft Launch:** The public beta (`app.airbuy.ai`) launches Monday with a new article. This "soft launch" is for early customer feedback before a major campaign in May (PR, ads, conferences).](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**AI Tracking Strategy Shift:** The focus is moving from tracking explanatory prompts to high-intent prompts that trigger tool/platform recommendations, aiming to capture users in their evaluation phase.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Content Performance:** January traffic hit 1.6k sessions. The "Building Production Agents" pillar has a low bounce rate, signaling strong developer interest and a need for more technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**On-Page Optimization:** New Webflow tools will provide click data to guide on-page improvements (e.g., interactive elements) to reduce high bounce rates, which currently exceed the 30–40% industry average.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

## Topics

### Agent Engine Launch & CTAs

  - [**Launch Plan:** A "soft launch" on Monday for the public beta (`app.airbuy.ai`) will gather early customer feedback. A major campaign (PR, ads, conferences) is planned for May.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**CTA Updates:** All articles will be updated with new CTAs linking to:](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Product Page: `airbuy.com.ai`](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Public Beta Sign-up: `app.airbuy.ai`](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Launch Article (publishes Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Talk to Sales](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Tracking:** Public beta sign-ups will be tracked as a HockeyStack conversion event, mirroring the current "cloud signup" for the Replication Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Performance & Optimization

  - [**January Traffic:** 1,600+ sessions, 1,100+ unique visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**Pillar Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**High Engagement:** "Context Engineering," "MCP Servers," "Building Production Agents."](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Low Bounce Rate:** "Building Production Agents" → signals strong developer interest.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Low Engagement:** "Enterprise Agent Governance and Security" → may require a topic rethink.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Optimization Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reduce high bounce rates (currently above the 30–40% industry average).](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
          - [Add more developer-centric content (e.g., code snippets).](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
          - [Use new Webflow tools to analyze click data and guide on-page improvements (e.g., interactive demos).](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

### AI Tracking Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Tracking explanatory prompts (e.g., "What is X?") yields low product traction, as users consume the answer directly from the LLM.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift focus to high-intent prompts that trigger tool/platform recommendations (e.g., "Which tools provide connectors for AI agents?").](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Tool:** Using `check.ai` to track prompts, replacing `Scrunch`.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
        1.  [Airbyte team will mark high-intent prompts in the existing list.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
        2.  [Erik will upload the refined list to `check.ai`.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
        3.  [Erik will use `check.ai`'s "Query Fanouts" feature to find similar high-intent queries.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Article Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**This Week:** 12 articles for review (5 new, 1 in progress).](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**Pending:** "Why agents need ontology" (awaiting Kushal's review).](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Wireframe Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [**Problem:** Tanmay cannot comment on the wireframe in `Lovable`.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [**Solution:** Erik will request comment access from designer Talal. If unsuccessful, Erik will upload a page image to Notion for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [Request `Lovable` comment access for Tanmay; upload to Notion if not possible.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [Update all article CTAs with new Agent Engine links.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Upload the refined, high-intent prompt list to `check.ai`.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [Review the 12 new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [Mark high-intent prompts in the shared list.](https://fathom.video/share/dqZB_QxnZPhdtZxYP-YfigeE-x5vn2Uk?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

action_items.description: Review 5 new Airtable articles; send go-ahead to Erik
Ping Kushal re: 'Why agents need ontology' review
Update CTA across all articles to new link
Coordinate w/ Talal to enable Tanmay wireframe comments; if blocked upload to Notion
Notify Joe re: Agent Engine CTA links; update across articles
Join Erik's CheckThat space; add context
Mark high-intent prompts in shared sheet; send updated list to Erik
Grant Tanmay edit access to CheckThat workspace
Send DER articles list to Nithin
